value.text: Block release completion until a durable follow-up verification record is linked to the required verification task.
Create a service-owner escalation task for every failed canary check and require acknowledgement before the failure can be cleared.
Persist operator state only in the workspace-scoped local state store. Do not publish raw operator state in product artifacts.
Require an explicit operator approval intent and a validated Platform approval decision before any promotion request or release action.
